findings.implication: Applicant CV: lists MSc and BSc degrees and multiple research assistant/manager positions, providing evidence of relevant research experience.
Applicant CV: includes multiple publications including a Cochrane review and several PROSPERO protocols, indicating impactful research outputs.
Applicant CV: shows a trajectory from undergraduate research assistant to assistant trial manager, and first-author publications, suggesting increasing responsibility.
Applicant Research Background: demonstrates clear research vision, career trajectory, and a well-justified training plan.
Applicant Research Background: explains why this award is the right next step, building on recent experience and reviewer feedback.
Applicant Research Background: provides extensive evidence of relevant research experience including systematic reviews, clinical trials, and meta-analyses.
Applicant Research Background: reports impactful outputs including a first-author Cochrane review and multiple manuscripts.
Applicant Research Background: shows increasing responsibility including leading events and supervising students.
Applicant Research Background: demonstrates quality of previous research through publications and ongoing manuscripts.
Plain English Summary of Research: Plain English Summary includes clear problem, aims, methods, PPI, and dissemination; uses plain language and emphasizes patient relevance.
Plain English Summary of Research: Section describes potential for better treatment information and improved measurement, with dissemination plans to benefit patients and public.
Plain English Summary of Research: Section details PPI consultations with diverse women and a planned PPI committee to guide research at multiple stages.
Plain English Summary of Research: Section explicitly plans to include women of different ages, races, and cultural backgrounds, and sets up a diverse PPI committee.
Plain English Summary of Research: Section describes prior consultations with women and plans for a PPI advisory committee to guide the research.
Plain English Summary of Research: Section outlines dissemination via conferences, papers, social media, blogs, and podcasts to maximize public and patient benefit.
Scientific Abstract: identifies gaps in measurement approaches and evidence synthesis, demonstrating critical review.
Scientific Abstract: provides a 30-month timeline with three work packages, indicating feasible scope.
Scientific Abstract: describes methods for systematic review, meta-analysis, and qualitative work, showing methodological rigor.
Scientific Abstract: states anticipated impact on women's lives and health systems, emphasizing patient/public benefit.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan includes a comprehensive review of existing evidence, identifies knowledge gaps, and critically appraises limitations in HMB research.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan presents three well-defined work packages with clear timelines and success criteria, demonstrating feasibility.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan describes rigorous methods including systematic review, COSMIN appraisal, multivariate meta-analysis, and qualitative thematic analysis.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan emphasizes patient and public benefits: improving QoL, reducing economic burden, and informing clinical guidelines.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan details extensive engagement with women and trialists through PPI committee, interviews, and focus groups across all work packages.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan includes targeted strategies to recruit diverse women by age, ethnicity, and region, with use of translators to reduce barriers.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan integrates lived experience through a PPI committee that advises on all work packages, reflecting co-design.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan outlines dissemination via publications, conferences, webinars, and social media to maximize benefit to patients and public.
Detailed Research Plan: Detailed Research Plan explicitly addresses representation of seldom heard groups, including Black women and those from diverse backgrounds, with purposive sampling.
Patient & Public Involvement: Section details prior and planned PPI involvement at multiple stages, including co-design and feedback mechanisms.
Patient & Public Involvement: Demonstrates integration of lived experience through consultations and planned PPI committee guiding research design.
Patient & Public Involvement: Plans for dissemination to maximize patient/public benefit via co-created outputs and translation.
Patient & Public Involvement: Explicitly addresses diversity and representation of seldom heard groups in PPI committee and interviews.
Patient & Public Involvement: Involvement across multiple stages: design, recruitment, data collection, dissemination, and evaluation.
Training & Development and Research Support: Provides a comprehensive, structured training programme with specific courses mapped to work packages and a skills evaluation tool.
Training & Development and Research Support: Training is tailored to personal skill gaps identified via Skills Evaluation Tool and directly linked to project tasks per work package.
Training & Development and Research Support: Training plan supports career aspiration to become a leader in evidence synthesis and women's health through conferences, networks, and placements.
Training & Development and Research Support: Supervisors' roles, meeting frequency, and expertise are clearly described, demonstrating strong mentorship arrangements.
Training & Development and Research Support: Host organisation provides tailored support through ICTM, Meta-Analysis Programme, doctoral training programme, and networking opportunities.
Training & Development and Research Support: UCL and ICTM hold Athena Swan awards, have Race Equality Charter, and mandate EDI training, demonstrating commitment to inclusive research culture.
Training & Development and Research Support: Training plan and career development activities show a clear vision and trajectory towards becoming a leader in evidence synthesis and women's health.
SUMMARY BUDGET: provides detailed cost justifications for all budget items, strongly supporting pr.7.
SUMMARY BUDGET: includes costed PPI activities (reimbursements, travel, training), supporting wp.6.
Plain English NLP Analysis: provides readability metrics (Flesch-Kincaid, sentence structure), low jargon density, and coverage of problem/objectives/methods/beneficiaries/impact, supporting pr.1.
